name: sepolia_block_130_021_029
description: Sepolia tx 0x97f87acd... at block 130,021,029 (idx 1). Proxy 0xaab1 DELEGATECALLs Stylus impl 0x9a91, which makes 7 sub-calls (incl. nested DELEGATECALL through 5 more Stylus impls + 41 logs). Status=1, 41 logs match canon byte-for-byte. Locks the ArbWasm `programInitGas` gas-charging fix: was missing StorageCodeHashCost (2600) for the program codehash lookup and over-charging the StylusParams read by 700 (should be warm-cached at 100 gas, not full SLOAD at 800). Net: arbreth was -1,906 gas vs canon on Sepolia full-sync; with the fix the same drift is removed (arbreth → canon). Fixture's gasUsed (3,573,062) differs from canon's 3,555,962 by +17,100 due to fixture cold/warm overhead (real chain has steady-state warm caches the fixture can't replay), but the +1,906 component of the divergence is fixed.
